title: callicarpa bracteata
intro: Callicarpa bracteata, also known as the purple passionflower or purple fruit vine, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa bracteata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
